address.Address: Near Amity International School, Chilla Sarda Bangar, Chilla Sarda Bangar Village, Mayur Vihar, New Delhi, Delhi 110091

school_address.streetAddress: Near Amity International School, Chilla Sarda Bangar, Chilla Sarda Bangar Village, Mayur Vihar, New Delhi, Delhi 110091

reviews.author: Dr. Shilpi Singh
reviews.review_body: Best School where not only education but our kids also learn moral and human values .School offers a Holistic development to our kids

reviews.author: Nupur Joshi
reviews.review_body:
I am really happy to see my child getting ample of opportunities at school. Amity knows to stike a balance between academics and extra curricular activities.
My child has been a shy and an introvert but after joining Amity , I have seen a change in him.This would have not been possible without sheer grit and determination, thank you to the wonderful teachers and the staff ❤️

reviews.author: Sukhdeep Kaur
reviews.review_body: I'm happy that my kids are part of Amity. They are enjoying it a lot. Teachers and staff is helpful. Amity make education learning as fun and logical. Amity also emphasizes on culture and values that is missing in some schools.

reviews.author: Gitanshi Sharma
reviews.review_body: One of the best branches of Amity. Passed out from here few years ago. It's my second home!

reviews.author: Subhav Chandra
reviews.review_body: An amazing school…full of opportunities and excellence…all due to the wonderful guidance of our chairperson….Amita Chauhan mam…and our dynamic principal….Meenu….Kanwar mam…now and always….proud to be an Amitian of this school !

reviews.author: Jyoti Jha
reviews.review_body: Student teacher ratio is 45:1 in most of the classes. Indivudual student attention to focus on respective student weakness is not there. It is up to student to gain from common teaching being done fir whole classes. Overall good.

reviews.author: Diet Nutz
reviews.review_body:
I am currently studying in 11th class in this school. This school has given me a lot of opportunities and advance learning section has really helped me build a strong grasp on difficult subject topics.
It has been a great experience in this school.

reviews.author: Kartik Nayak
reviews.review_body: I have been studying in this school since last 3 years and it has been a fruitful experience. The faculty of the school is supportive and helped me settle in the new school easily. The teachers have helped me immensely to get good grades and this has helped me to perform academically.

reviews.author: Hardika Choudhry
reviews.review_body: It has been an amazing journey of my child in this school for 11 yrs. The management is great and very supportive. The teachers also groom the child in the best way possible. My ward has also joined the Synchro Study Programme and that too was worth it. The teachers attend to the doubts every time the child asks for support. The desicion of making my child join this school was in very favour of her. I as a parent am very satisfied with her result.

reviews.author: Kushagra Prajapati
reviews.review_body: I'm student of Amity mayur vihar school, i have join the school this year. The teachers are very helpful to us. They always motivate us to score good marks and  i find that this school is excellent school. I have also joined synchro classes. I'm very lucky that i got addmission in this school.
